subject: [PATCH v2 2/9] nfsd: RCU-protect cl_cb_session to fix use-after-free on session teardown

2026-05-30.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free bug in the NFS daemon by converting the cl_cb_session pointer to an RCU-protected pointer. The bug occurs when a session is destroyed while rpciod still holds an inflight callback task that dereferences the freed session. The patch uses RCU (Read-Copy Update) to ensure that readers on rpciod do not access freed memory. It also moves assignments of cl_cb_session to after successful creation of a backchannel and clears it on error returns, and switches from kfree() to kfree_rcu() for freeing the session slab.
